languages.text: "Потрясающе, Фактотум. Особенно то, что я узнаю о бунте уже после его подавления".

traits.locale_text: "Потрясающе, Фактотум. Особенно то, что я узнаю о бунте уже после его подавления".

languages.text: "Marvellous, High Factotum — particularly the fact that I am learning of the mutiny only after it has already been suppressed."
languages.original_text: "Потрясающе, Фактотум. Особенно то, что я узнаю о бунте уже после его подавления".

traits.locale_text: "Marvellous, Factotum. Particularly the fact that I learn of the mutiny only after it has been suppressed."
"Marvellous, Factotum — particularly the fact that I am learning of the mutiny only after it has already been suppressed."
"Marvellous, Factotum — particularly the fact that I am learning of the mutiny only after it has already been suppressed."
"Marvellous, High Factotum — particularly the fact that I am learning of the mutiny only after it has already been suppressed."

languages.text: «Maravilloso, Sumo Factótum. Me fascina especialmente el hecho de haberme enterado del motín después de que haya sido contenido».
languages.original_text: "Marvellous, High Factotum — particularly the fact that I am learning of the mutiny only after it has already been suppressed."

traits.locale_text: «Maravilloso, Sumo Factótum. Me fascina especialmente el hecho de haberme enterado del motín después de que haya sido contenido».

languages.text: “真是了不起啊，高阶顾问。尤其我居然是在叛乱平定之后才听说这件事。”
languages.original_text: "Marvellous, High Factotum — particularly the fact that I am learning of the mutiny only after it has already been suppressed."

traits.locale_text: “真是了不起啊，高阶顾问。尤其我居然是在叛乱平定之后才听说这件事。”

languages.text: « Merveilleux, haut factotum. Surtout le fait que j'aie vent de cette mutinerie après qu'elle a été matée. »
languages.original_text: "Marvellous, High Factotum — particularly the fact that I am learning of the mutiny only after it has already been suppressed."

traits.locale_text: « Merveilleux, haut factotum. Surtout le fait que j'aie vent de cette mutinerie après qu'elle a été matée. »

languages.text: "Ne güzel Arşıkâhya. Özellikle de isyanı ancak bastırıldıktan sonra öğrenmiş olmam."
languages.original_text: "Marvellous, High Factotum — particularly the fact that I am learning of the mutiny only after it has already been suppressed."

traits.locale_text: "Ne güzel Arşıkâhya. Özellikle de isyanı ancak bastırıldıktan sonra öğrenmiş olmam."

languages.text: 「素晴らしい、ハイ・ファクトム。特に、反乱が鎮圧された後にそのことを知ることです」
languages.original_text: "Marvellous, High Factotum — particularly the fact that I am learning of the mutiny only after it has already been suppressed."

traits.locale_text: 「素晴らしい、ハイ・ファクトム。特に、反乱が鎮圧された後にそのことを知ることです」

languages.text: "Wunderbar, Hoch-Faktotum. Vor allem der Umstand, dass ich erst nach ihrer Niederschlagung von der Meuterei erfahre."
languages.original_text: "Marvellous, High Factotum — particularly the fact that I am learning of the mutiny only after it has already been suppressed."

traits.locale_text: "Wunderbar, Hoch-Faktotum. Vor allem der Umstand, dass ich erst nach ihrer Niederschlagung von der Meuterei erfahre."
